goal: All chat data-fetching hooks exist and a conversation list page is browseable.
summary: Conversations + Query Hooks phase complete. Created conversations.ts with useConversations (fetches conversations with last message, other participant profile, unread count) and useCreateConversation (checks for duplicate before creating). Created messages.ts with useMessages, useSendMessage (updates conversation last_message_at), and useMarkAsRead. Built ConversationsPage.tsx with conversation list UI (avatar, name, last message preview, unread badge, date). Updated App.tsx routing: /chat → ConversationsPage, /chat/:conversationId → ChatPage. Wired ChatPage to read conversationId from useParams. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Create src/queries/conversations.ts with useConversations (fetch with last message info) and useCreateConversation [verified]
  2. Create src/queries/messages.ts with useMessages(conversationId), useSendMessage, and useMarkAsRead [verified]
  3. Build a ConversationsList component/page showing conversations with avatars, usernames, last message preview, and unread count [verified]
  4. Update App.tsx to route /chat to the conversation list, and pass conversationId to ChatPage for threads [verified]
  5. Type-check after changes [verified]
